ogTitle: Hollywell vs Holroyd River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hollywell and Holroyd River.
heading: Hollywell vs Holroyd River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hollywell, Queensland and Holroyd River, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Holroyd River has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Hollywell (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hollywell or Holroyd River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hollywell has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Holroyd River scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hollywell scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Holroyd River scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hollywell or Holroyd River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Holroyd River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
